notes_on_model_string: Pentagon uses 'claude-opus-4-7[1m]' (with [1m] suffix for 1M-context variant) for its pentagon.defaultModel preference, but the per-agent model column uses 'claude-opus-4-7' (no suffix). Verifier checks these as two separate fields.
rationale: Migrated 2026-05-27. Forcing function: Codex CLI account credit exhaustion blocked T7 medium runs 015+, exposing Codex billing as the deepest dependency. Carmen canary on bridge runClaude() confirmed end-to-end dispatch works for claude-code/opus-4.7. Pentagon binary has full ClaudeCodeProvider/ClaudeStreamParserAdapter/ClaudeLaunchBuilder support; bridge runClaude() handles dispatch (Pentagon native poller has been silently non-functional for active_graph workspace and the bridge is the actual dispatcher).
scope: All active_graph Pentagon agents (originally 20, all 5 active + 15 on-demand specialists).

verification.frozen_historical_evidence: Historical log files at scripts/verify-pentagon-autonomy-from-logs.mjs lines 2166/2168/2201 retain the 2026-05-23 gpt-5.5/codex snapshot. These pin history and are NOT updated by cohort migration.
